title: spiraea × subcanescens
intro: Spiraea × subcanescens, also known as the white or downy spirea, is a deciduous shrub that is a hybrid of Spiraea salicifolia and Spiraea thunbergii. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing due to its high content of flavonoids and salicylic acid. The health benefits of Spiraea × subcanescens include its potential to alleviate pain, reduce fever, and act as an antiseptic, making it a popular choice in herbal medicine. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
